channel.title: math.SP updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.SP updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Asymptotic behavior and spectral distortion for biharmonic Steklov problems on thin domains
item.description: arXiv:2602.23818v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this paper, we investigate the asymptotic behavior of the eigenvalues and eigenfunctions of a biharmonic Steklov problem defined on a thin domain in the $n$ dimensional Euclidean space degenerating to a segment. For $n=2$ the problem models the vibrations of a thin elastic plate with cross section represented by the given domain and mass concentrated on a free boundary. The problem under consideration depends on a parameter $\sigma$ that in the theory of elastic plates represents the Poisson ratio of the material. Our analysis points out a distortion in the limiting problem depending on $\sigma$ and the space dimension $n$.
item.dc:creator: Bauyrzhan Derbissaly, Pier Domenico Lamberti

item.title: CLT for the trace functional of the IDS of magnetic random Schr\"{o}dinger operators
item.description: arXiv:2511.14448v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We consider the existence of the integrated density of states (IDS) of the magnetic Schr\"{o}dinger operator with a random potential on the Hilbert space \( L^2(\mathbb{R}^d) \), as an analogue of the law of large numbers (LLN) for trace functionals. In this work, we establish an analogue of the central limit theorem (CLT), which describes the fluctuations of the trace functionals of the IDS, for a class of test functions denoted by \( C^1_{d,0}(\mathbb{R}) \). This class consists of real-valued, continuously differentiable functions on \( \mathbb{R} \) that decay at the rate \( O(|x|^{-m}) \) as \( |x| \to \infty \), where \( m > d + 1 \).
item.dc:creator: Dhriti Ranjan Dolai, Naveen Kumar
